2605.10108.title: GLiNER-Relex: A Unified Framework for Joint Named Entity Recognition and Relation Extraction
2605.10108.paper_summary: Joint named entity recognition (NER) and relation extraction (RE) is a fundamental task in natural language processing for constructing knowledge graphs from unstructured text. While recent approaches treat NER and RE as separate tasks requiring distinct models, we introduce GLiNER-Relex, a unified architecture that extends the GLiNER framework to perform both entity recognition and relation extraction in a single model. Our approach leverages a shared bidirectional transformer encoder to jointly represent text, entity type labels, and relation type labels, enabling zero-shot extraction of arbitrary entity and relation types specified at inference time. GLiNER-Relex constructs entity pair representations from recognized spans and scores them against relation type embeddings using a dedicated relation scoring module. We evaluate our model on four standard relation extraction benchmarks: CoNLL04, DocRED, FewRel, and CrossRE, and demonstrate competitive performance against both specialized relation extraction models and large language models, while maintaining the computational efficiency characteristic of the GLiNER family. The model is released as an open-source Python package with a simple inference API that allows users to specify arbitrary entity and relation type labels at inference time and obtain both entities and relation triplets in a single call. All models and code are publicly available.
2605.10108.paper_summary_zh: 聯合命名實體識別 (NER) 和關係提取 (RE) 是自然語言處理中一項基本任務，旨在從非結構化文本中構建知識圖譜。雖然最近的方法將 NER 和 RE 視為需要不同模型的獨立任務，但我們提出了 GLiNER-Relex，一個統一架構，擴展了 GLiNER 框架，以在單一模型中執行實體識別和關係提取。我們的方法利用共享的雙向Transformer編碼器，聯合表示文本、實體類型標籤和關係類型標籤，使得在推理時能夠零樣本提取任意指定的實體和關係類型。GLiNER-Relex 從識別的範圍構建實體對表示，並使用專門的關係評分模組對其進行關係類型嵌入的評分。我們在四個標準關係提取基準上評估我們的模型：CoNLL04、DocRED、FewRel 和 CrossRE，並展示了與專門的關係提取模型和大型語言模型的競爭性能，同時保持 GLiNER 系列特有的計算效率。該模型作為開源 Python 包發布，具有簡單的推理 API，允許用戶在推理時指定任意實體和關係類型標籤，並在一次調用中獲得實體和關係三元組。所有模型和代碼均可公開獲得。
2605.10108.author: Ihor Stepanov et.al.
2605.10108.authors: Ihor Stepanov, Oleksandr Lukashov, Mykhailo Shtopko, Vivek Kalyanarangan
